data.body: Superseded by ADR-0047 / epic d4de-7d65-2a96-48be (fleshy-kimberlite-crayfish). The full Phase-1 serial auto-lander (S1-S6) was implemented and landed on origin/main ~2026-07-12/13 and ran live (landed Gerrit change #618, MERGED 2026-07-13), then was deliberately retired the same day after bug 0d3e (non-sticky Autosubmit label dropped by the bot's own rebase, stalling landings under concurrent traffic). ADR-0047 cut main over to Gerrit-native Rebase-If-Necessary and deleted infra/autolander/, the land/land-status command, the compose service, ACLs, and observability; only the AC6 access snapshot + ADR-0042 (stamped 'Superseded by ADR-0047') survive at HEAD. Closing as superseded rather than complete: the deliverable was reverted and no longer exists on origin/main. Last open child S5 (3c55) closed as superseded first.
